feed.title: Welcome to Happy Ferret Entertainment Blog
feed.subtitle: Welcome to Happy Ferret Entertainment Blog

entry.title: Welcome
entry.summary: Welcome to the official home of Happy Ferret Entertainment
entry.content:
Welcome to the official home of Happy Ferret Entertainment​

As of the time of writing, the website is still under heavy development.

In the future, I hope to make this an excellent source for information on all of our upcoming games.

The little game window you find as part of the landing page represents an attempt at providing information interactively and playfully.

While we'll always maintain a more orthodox way to view our website, interested parties will be able to browse concept art, trailer videos, reviews and a metric ton of other information from the comfort of our in-house SCUNK engine (the same engine that will drive many of our future titles).
